name: default
description: SecureClaims AI development agent with auto-push on completion

stop.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location 'D:\Meena_1\CapstoneProject\Project\SecureClaims-AI'; $changed = git status --porcelain; if ($changed) { git add -A; git commit -m 'chore: auto-push changes after agent response'; git push } else { Write-Output 'No changes to push' }"
